app.title: FartOL
app.subtitle: Competition readout
runners.title: Registered runners
runners.empty.title: No runners registered yet
runners.empty.desc: Import the startlist from Eventor or upload an IOF EntryList file.
runners.noResults.title: No matches for "{{q}}"
runners.noResults.desc: Try a different search term or pick another class.
runners.importSheet.title: Import runners
importRunners.title: Registered runners
importRunners.subtitle: Import the startlist from Eventor — or upload an IOF EntryList file.
importRunners.eventor.title: Fetch from Eventor
importRunners.eventor.desc: Search shows events organised by StorTuna OK on the chosen date. Pick the right event and click Import.
importRunners.eventor.noEvents: No Eventor events for StorTuna OK on {{date}}.
importRunners.upload.title: Upload IOF EntryList
importRunners.upload.desc: Use this if Eventor is unreachable or the event is organised by a different club. Expects IOF XML 3.0 EntryList.
importRunners.autoBound: {{count}} cards auto-bound to recently read brickor.
importRunners.classesMissing: Some classes could not be matched (check class names): {{classes}}
importRunners.errBadDate: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
importRunners.errNoKey: Eventor API key missing — add EVENTOR_API_KEY under Settings.
importRunners.errEventorDown: Eventor is not responding — retry later or upload an EntryList file.
importRunners.errWrongKind: The file is not an EntryList — choose an IOF EntryList XML.
home.title: Competitions
home.empty.title: No active competitions
home.empty.desc: Create a new competition to begin.
wiz.title: New competition
wiz.step1.title: Create competition
wiz.step1.desc: Name and date. You can change these later.
wiz.step1.quickstart: Quick start: import a course file to autofill
wiz.step1.quickstart.hint: IOF XML 3.0 CourseData (Condes/Purple Pen) — name and date are read from the file; you can edit them afterwards.
wiz.step1.quickstart.loaded: Course file imported — name and date prefilled below
wiz.step1.quickstart.error: Could not parse the file. Continue manually or try another file.
wiz.step2.title: Import course
wiz.step2.desc: Purple Pen .xml or IOF XML 3.0 CourseData. Classes auto-created.
wiz.step3.title: Start readout
wiz.step3.desc: Connect the BSM7/8 reader via USB. Ready when the light turns green.
wiz.name: Competition name
wiz.date.helper: Enter the date in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. 2026-05-20.
wiz.drop: Drop course file here or click to choose
wiz.drop.formats: Accepts Purple Pen .xml and IOF XML 3.0
ro.bridgeNotAttached: No reader attached to this server.
ro.waiting.desc: Insert an SI card in the reader to begin.
ro.print.fail: Printer offline — receipt could not be printed
ro.autoprint.hint: Print a receipt automatically on every read

registration.title: Registration desk
registration.welcome: Scan the SI card or type the number below
registration.empty: No cards queued — scan a card or type the number
registration.manualEntry.invalid: Invalid card number — digits only, at least 1.
walk.title: Walk-up registration
walk.desc: Unknown card read. Register the competitor and continue.
walk.name: Name
walk.consent: Consent has been obtained from the competitor (REQ-PRIV-001)
walk.hyrbricka.name: Contact name
walk.eventor.fill: Fetched from Eventor — please check the name
walk.err.name: Name must be at least 2 characters.
walk.err.hyrbrickaContact: Enter at least phone or email for the hired card.
walk.err.cardTaken: Card {{card}} is already in use in this competition.
walk.discard.msg: Discard the form? Any typed values will be lost.
wiz.discard.msg: Cancel the wizard? Any typed values will be lost.
consent.title: Confirm consent
consent.body: {{name}} ({{className}}) is in the start list but has not yet confirmed consent. Confirm that consent has been obtained?

tweaks.eventor.title: Eventor
tweaks.eventor.stale: Eventor: cache is stale — refresh when online
settings.title: Settings
settings.integrations.title: Integration keys
settings.integrations.desc: API keys for external systems. Values are stored locally and never shown again after you click Save — you must re-enter to view.
settings.integrations.sourceEnvBanner: Value comes from ~/.env.fartol — UI saves are overwritten on next boot if the env value remains set
err.networkPersistent.title: Disconnected
err.networkPersistent.body: The save failed twice. Check the wifi signal and tap Retry — the form is preserved.
